name: The Silent Valley
description: Address 04. Recon One's last known position, nine days silent. Cross, find the trail, bring back anything that says where they went.

name: The Ledger of the Taken
description: Return to the valley. Karsu keeps the ledger of the taken — and knows whether four offworlders are still alive behind the gate.

name: The Tribute Call
description: Signal spires on the pass road sing each tribute train through the Door on Veyra — and sing the emptied trains back out. Take the spires in sequence and Command's hand is on the only call that opens the way home.

victoryEffects.text: The tribute call is ours. The Door on Veyra opens for what the spires ask — and now the spires ask what Command wants. The way home exists again: narrow, borrowed, and ours.

debrief: The spires answered in sequence and Command's hand closed over the tribute call. The Door on Veyra opens for what the spires ask — and now the spires ask what Command wants. The way home exists again: narrow, borrowed, and ours.

name: Secure the Relay
description: Raiders hold a working relay station at a dead address. Take the consoles intact and Command owns a listening post on the network.

name: Pilgrim Roads
description: The Door on Veyra opens one way. Cross to the god's seat and find a way into the Penitence before Recon One's trail goes cold.

name: The Penitence
description: The plan is set. Get inside the basilica-prison and find Recon One.

name: The First Blade
description: Seryn Vael, the Luminous One's champion, stands between you and the way out.

name: Relic Vault
description: Seize the precursor artifacts from the temple armory: arm the research, and find the god's sanctum.

name: The Luminous One
description: The vault core resonates with a sanctum in the caldera. Track it, and meet the god face to face.
